sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111660" key="fimoka/toxon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῑμοκάτοχον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n111660.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">charm to keep</tr_> men and dogs <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">silent,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cyran.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">57</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
